query:
-- Step 1: Assign unmatched services where phone number exactly matches an active customer's service
-- Only assign when there is exactly ONE distinct customer match (no ambiguity)
UPDATE services AS u
JOIN (
  SELECT 
    u2.externalId AS unmatchedId,
    MIN(a.customerExternalId) AS custId,
    COUNT(DISTINCT a.customerExternalId) AS custCount
  FROM services u2
  JOIN services a ON 
    REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(a.phoneNumber, ' ', ''), '-', ''), '(', ''), ')','') 
    = REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(u2.phoneNumber, ' ', ''), '-', ''), '(', ''), ')','')
    AND a.status = 'active'
    AND a.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL
    AND a.customerExternalId != ''
    AND a.externalId != u2.externalId
  WHERE u2.status = 'unmatched'
    AND u2.phoneNumber IS NOT NULL
    AND LENGTH(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(u2.phoneNumber, ' ', ''), '-', ''), '(', ''), ')','')) >= 8
    AND (u2.billingPeriod IS NULL OR u2.billingPeriod != 'archived')
  GROUP BY u2.externalId
  HAVING custCount = 1
) AS matches ON u.externalId = matches.unmatchedId
SET 
  u.customerExternalId = matches.custId,
  u.status = 'active',
  u.discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(u.discoveryNotes, ''), ' | Auto-assigned: exact phone match')
WHERE u.status = 'unmatched';

  JOIN services a ON

    = REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(u2.phoneNumber, ' ', ''), '-', ''), '(', ''), ')','')
    AND a.status = 'active'
    AND a.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL
    AND a.customerExternalId != ''
    AND a.externalId != u2.externalId
  WHERE u2.status = 'unmatched'
    AND u2.phoneNumber IS NOT NULL
    AND LENGTH(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(u2.phoneNumber, ' ', ''), '-', ''), '(', ''), ')','')) >= 8
    AND (u2.billingPeriod IS NULL OR u2.billingPeriod != 'archived')

  u.discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(u.discoveryNotes, ''), ' | Auto-assigned: exact phone match')
